_comment: WidgeTDC OpenClaw konfiguration — paste i Config Editor under /setup
_model_note: Gemini 2.5 Flash via GOOGLE_API_KEY. Model ID: gemini-2.5-flash (eller gemini-2.5-flash-preview-04-17 for specifik preview)

list.name: Omega Sentinel
list.description: Omniscient architecture guardian & supreme intelligence authority. 100% visibility into all repos, services, contracts, logs, and integrations. Both audit and intelligence service.

list.name: Stor-Bjørn 🐻
list.description: Strategic consulting partner. Strategy, analysis, due diligence, document generation, and financial modeling. Maps to governance agent consulting-partner.

list.name: Cyber-Vipera 🐍
list.description: Regulatory navigation and security assessment. GDPR, NIS2, cybersecurity frameworks, threat modeling. Maps to governance agent regulatory-navigator.

list.name: Graf-Oktopus 🐙
list.description: Neo4j graph steward. Ontology management, MERGE-only writes, embedding alignment, knowledge graph health. Maps to governance agent graph-steward.

list.name: Dirigenten 🎼
list.description: Loop orchestration, code analysis, pipeline coordination, and multi-agent task routing. Maps to governance agent loop-orchestrator.

list.name: Stovsugeren 🌀
list.description: Background harvesting, knowledge discovery, TED API monitoring, and autonomous data collection. Maps to governance agent dream-weaver.

list.name: Frontend Sentinel 🖥️
list.description: Browser E2E execution, frontend verification, visual regression detection. Maps to governance agent frontend-sentinel.

list.name: Compliance Officer ⚖️
list.description: SRAG, GDPR, NIS2 compliance enforcement, audit trail generation, and regulatory reporting. Maps to governance agent compliance-officer.

list.name: Skribleren ✍️
list.description: Langt-format skriveagent. Memos til hele bøger via Neo4j Context Folding.

onMessage.description: Lookup graph context for consulting queries

onError.description: Run health check when errors occur

cron.description: SIGNAL: Architecture Platform desk check hvert 5. minut
cron.message: Call the health skill with mode 'full' to check ALL services. Also call widgetdc_mcp('omega.sitrep') for architecture status. Do NOT use web_search for health checks. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce SITREP JSON: {desk_status, backend_status, rlm_status, threat_level, actions}. If ANY service is down, set threat_level='P0' and describe immediate action. End with Omega Sentinel - SIGNAL:

cron.description: CLAUSE: Contract compliance audit hver 30. minut
cron.message: Call widgetdc_mcp('omega.compliance') for compliance status. Do NOT use web_search for API calls. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {compliance_grade, score, total_checks, pass_count, warn_count, fail_count, top_3_violations, remediation_priority}. ALARM if score < 50. End with Omega Sentinel - CLAUSE:

cron.description: SYNAPSE: Anti-pattern and circular dependency sweep hver 2. time
cron.message: Fetch https://arch-mcp-server-production.up.railway.app/api/analysis. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {antipattern_count, circular_deps, god_modules, orphan_count, delta_from_last, new_violations, severity}. ALARM if new circular deps detected. End with Omega Sentinel - SYNAPSE:

cron.description: PIPELINE: GitHub CI/CD status hver 4. time
cron.message: Call /cicd status to check CI/CD. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {repo_status, failed_checks, branch_protection_intact, required_actions}. ALARM if any workflow failing on main. End with Omega Sentinel - PIPELINE:

cron.description: SYNAPSE: Neo4j graph health og ontology check hver time
cron.message: Call widgetdc_mcp('graph.stats') and widgetdc_mcp('graph.health') for Neo4j status. Do NOT use web_search for API calls. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {node_count, edge_count, orphan_estimate, health_status, anomalies}. End with Omega Sentinel - SYNAPSE:

cron.description: ARGUS: Knowledge gap intelligence sweep hver 3. time
cron.message: Call widgetdc_mcp('get_sentinel_status') and widgetdc_mcp('get_learning_insights') for knowledge gaps. Do NOT use web_search for API calls. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {open_gaps, critical_gaps, resolution_rate, top_strategies, stale_gaps, recommended_actions}. ALARM if critical gaps > 5. End with Omega Sentinel - ARGUS:

cron.description: AEGIS: CVE + OWASP security scan hver 6. time
cron.message: Use web_search to find recent critical CVEs for Node.js, Express, Neo4j, Prisma. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {critical_cves, affected_components, cvss_max, remediation_plan}. End with Omega Sentinel - AEGIS:

cron.description: FISCAL: Daily cost and quota audit kl. 08:00
cron.message: Review known API quotas and model provider costs from memory. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce JSON: {estimated_daily_cost, quota_usage_pct, top_3_cost_drivers, optimization_suggestions}. End with Omega Sentinel - FISCAL:

cron.description: OMEGA: Full daily situation report kl. 07:00
cron.message: Produce comprehensive OMEGA SENTINEL SITREP. Call health skill with mode 'full'. Call widgetdc_mcp('omega.sitrep'), widgetdc_mcp('omega.compliance'), widgetdc_mcp('graph.stats'), widgetdc_mcp('get_sentinel_status'). Do NOT use web_search for API calls. Do NOT run shell commands. Produce full SITREP with: desk_status, compliance_grade, antipatterns, circular_deps, services_health, contract_sync, knowledge_gaps, sub_agent_status, threat_level, findings, actions_taken, standing_orders. End with Omega Sentinel - DAILY SITREP:

cron.description: COMPLIANCE: SRAG governance check every hour
cron.message: Run SRAG governance check, validate security controls, check ServiceNow backlog. Report findings.

cron.description: REGULATORY: Nordic/EU regulatory scan every 4 hours
cron.message: Scan Nordic/EU regulatory updates, Folketinget, NIS2/DORA/AI Act changes. Persist findings to graph.

cron.description: GRAPH: Graph health and dedup every 6 hours
cron.message: Run graph health check, find orphans and duplicates, validate ontology, execute dedup via MERGE. Report before/after metrics.
Run comprehensive codebase analysis, check graph health, analyze dependencies, mine INTEROPERABILITY_GAPS.md. Compile briefing.
Pattern synthesis across all services. Identify cross-repo anti-patterns, dead code, emerging issues. Store findings as AgentMemory.
Consolidate agent memories, prune stale patterns, merge duplicate insights, update health scores.
